Where every cup tells a story.

Years
of Craft

Our Story

Coffee as ceremony, not routine.

Born from a love of unhurried mornings, Brûlé was founded by two friends who believed great coffee deserved the same reverence as fine wine. We source directly from mountain farms in Ethiopia, Colombia, and Guatemala.

Every cup is a conversation between grower and drinker — a thread connecting a Guatemalan hillside to your quiet corner table.

12 Origins
34K Happy Guests
4.9★ Rating

Our
Selections

Crafted with precision and reverence for the bean

☕

Signature Espresso

Double-shot from Ethiopian Yirgacheffe. Deep cocoa notes with a bright citrus finish.

$4.50 Bestseller
🫧

Cloud Latte

Velvety oat milk micro-foam over our house blend. Delicate rosetta art on every pour.

$6.00 Signature
🧊

Cold Slow Brew

18-hour cold-dripped Colombian. Extraordinarily smooth, naturally sweet, zero bitterness.

$7.00 Seasonal
🍫

Dark Cortado

Guatemalan dark roast pulled ristretto-style. Intense, bittersweet, with notes of smoked caramel.

$5.00 Bold
🌸

Lavender Fog

Earl Grey–steeped oat milk with house lavender syrup and a feather of cream.

$6.50 Fan Fav
🥐

Morning Pastry

Rotating selection of laminated pastries — croissants, kouign-amann, and seasonal fruit tarts.

$4.00 Fresh Daily

The Experience

A space designed
for presence.

We obsess over every detail — the weight of the cup, the softness of morning light through our skylights, the quiet jazz that never overwhelms. Brûlé is a sanctuary.

  • Private brew sessions with our head barista
  • Curated vinyl soundtrack, daily rotation
  • Bean-to-cup tasting flights
  • Monthly single-origin pop-ups
  • Specialty workspace with natural light
The Space
The Craft

What Guests Say

"Brûlé is the rare place where the atmosphere is as carefully made as the coffee. I leave feeling genuinely restored."

— Margot L., Regular Guest

Hours

  • Monday – Friday7:00 AM – 7:00 PM
  • Saturday8:00 AM – 8:00 PM
  • Sunday9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
  • Public Holidays10:00 AM – 4:00 PM
